title:
How can workers stay safe?
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## How can workers stay safe?
SaferMe uses data to warn people about hazards and risks at work. It’s good for us all when safety-critical data is shared by organisations working in the same location - it makes everybody safer.
Watch the video to find out more...
Video: How can workers stay safe?
SaferMe: https://www.safer.me/
